breadcrumbs.title: Sysmon File and Network

overview: As you have seen in the previous task, Sysmon can provide much more than just process creation events. It can log file and registry changes, network connections, DNS queries, and many other crucial events. Furthermore, you can configure what to log and what to skip, unlike with the default logs. workflow: Identify the user, host, process, network flow, or identity object involved.
Collect the highest-value logs first and preserve timestamps and assumptions.
